title: Ulyanovsk, Ulyanovsk Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ulyanovsk, Ulyanovsk Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ulyanovsk is a city in Ulyanovsk Oblast with a population of 620,000. The birthplace of Vladimir Lenin, a Volga River city with a well-preserved historic center and a major aviation industry.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
